properties.name: Castle Coole (National Trust)
properties.description: A grand neo-classical mansion surrounded by beautiful wooded parkland. Perfect for a family walk, with plenty of space for kids to run and explore.

properties.name: Enniskillen Castle
properties.description: Explore the history of Fermanagh within the castle walls. A great spot for kids to learn about knights and history right by the water's edge.

properties.name: Castle Archdale Country Park
properties.description: A massive country park on the shores of Lough Erne. Features woodland walks, a WWII museum, a great playground, and boat hire options.

properties.name: Florence Court (National Trust)
properties.description: A stunning 18th-century home with miles of forest trails, a walled garden, and a brilliant natural play area for children.
